randomGreetings: Hope you have a great day! ☀️
intro.about_me: As a frontend engineer, I specialize in building responsive and high-performance UIs across web, mobile, and desktop platforms. I have experience developing Web3 DApps and enterprise service platforms, with a strong focus on writing maintainable code and delivering smooth user experiences. I value teamwork and leverage my background in design to implement user-centric UI/UX with careful attention to detail.

personal.title: Personal Projects & Study
description: IELTS preparation & job search in AU/NZ market

details.fullDescription: Currently focusing on personal development and preparing for international opportunities. Building innovative projects while improving language skills for the Australian/New Zealand job market.

confidential_japanese_startup.title: Frontend development support for new B2C business initiatives (Remote)
description: IELTS preparation & job search in AU/NZ market

details.fullDescription: Worked as a frontend developer for a Japanese B2B service platform (remote). Built application pages for six different business types, developed shared UI components, and implemented responsive design. Designed multi-step forms with input validation and error handling. Managed bugs and improved UX pre- and post-launch. Contributed to service stability through continuous monitoring and issue resolution using Datadog.

turingum_web03_03.title: Support services for Web3 product campaign site and system development (Remote)
description: IELTS preparation & job search in AU/NZ market

details.fullDescription: Contributed to the development and maintenance of internal pages for the BASE area of a Web3 game platform. Worked on new feature implementation, applied design and functionality updates to existing pages, and handled various frontend issues and bug fixes to improve stability and user experience.

turingum_web03_02.title: Development support for a Web3 product campaign site (Remote)
description: IELTS preparation & job search in AU/NZ market

details.fullDescription: I was responsible for frontend development, multilingual support, and code refactoring for a Web3 campaign site. Although it was a dynamic and animation-heavy site, I researched and integrated GSAP with Next.js, enabling smooth and efficient implementation. Later, I took over the initial "Mystery Ticket" feature and supported the frontend development of the BASE section, including confidential new tasks.

turingum_web03_01.title: Developed a campaign site for a Web3.0 project (Remote)
description: IELTS preparation & job search in AU/NZ market

details.fullDescription: As a freelance frontend developer, I contributed to the development of a Web3 campaign site for a major Japanese gaming company, working with a Japanese blockchain startup. I was responsible for frontend architecture and implementation using Next.js, with a focus on multilingual support, refactoring, and responsive design. While the team included a designer, I also supported UI refinement by creating assets and identifying usability issues. I developed a Merkle tree CLI tool, which was later adopted internally, and the frontend structure I built has been used as a reference for internal onboarding and training.
